Class DRWaterfallBarPlot

ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.chart.plot.AbstractBasePlot

ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.chart.plot.DRBarPlot
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.chart.plot.DRWaterfallBarPlot
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIAxisPlot, DRIBarPlot, DRIBasePlot, DRIPlot, DRIWaterfallBarPlot, Serializable
public class DRWaterfallBarPlot extends DRBarPlot implements DRIWaterfallBarPlot
